capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a log management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise log management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise log management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the log management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the log management service is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular log management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for log management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether log management KPIs and KRIs are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for log management

questions.prompt: Are log management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether log management KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track log ingestion coverage, pipeline latency, or gaps in centralized collection?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether log ingestion coverage and latency metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Log ingestion coverage and pipeline latency metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization measure storage utilization and retention policy compliance for logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether storage utilization and retention compliance are measured
questions.evaluation_focus: Storage utilization and retention compliance

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a logging system to manage and correlate all logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a logging system manages and correlates all logs
questions.evaluation_focus: Logging system to manage and correlate all logs

questions.prompt: Does the logging system consume raw logs from all segments of the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the logging system consumes raw logs enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Raw log consumption from all enterprise segments

questions.prompt: Does the logging system implement automation to process large volumes of logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether log processing is automated at scale
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation to process large volumes of logs

questions.prompt: Is logging system configuration reviewed at least quarterly to maintain efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether logging system configuration is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular logging system configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the logging system integrate with compliance, vulnerability, and asset management for contextual information?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the logging system integrates with other management platforms
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance, vulnerability, and asset management

questions.prompt: Do all identity technologies send identity and access logs automatically to centralized logging?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether identity logs are collected centrally and automatically
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized identity and access logging

questions.prompt: Do all endpoint device technologies send device and access logs automatically to centralized logging?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether endpoint logs are collected centrally and automatically
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized endpoint device and access logging

questions.prompt: Do all network technologies send network and access logs automatically to centralized logging?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network logs are collected centrally and automatically
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized network and access logging

questions.prompt: Do all application technologies send application and access logs automatically to centralized logging?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application logs are collected centrally and automatically
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized application and access logging

questions.prompt: Do all data asset technologies send data and access logs automatically to centralized logging?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether data access logs are collected centrally and automatically
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized data and access logging

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise logging solution have capability to monitor and identify anomalies?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the logging solution monitors and identifies anomalies
questions.evaluation_focus: Anomaly monitoring and identification capability

questions.prompt: Can responses to detected anomalies be configured to run automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether anomaly responses can be automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Configurable automated anomaly responses

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear scope defined for which devices and technology send logs to the logging server?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a clear logging scope is defined
questions.evaluation_focus: Clear defined logging scope for devices and technology

questions.prompt: Is logging scope reevaluated at least quarterly to maintain efficacy and storage stability?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether logging scope is reevaluated on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular scope reevaluation for efficacy and storage stability

questions.prompt: Does the logging solution produce audit logs for all technology that sends logs to it?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether audit logs are produced for all log-producing technology
questions.evaluation_focus: Audit logs for all log-producing technology

questions.prompt: Does the log management system store all logs securely and prevent unauthorized changes to logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether logs are stored securely and protected from unauthorized changes
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure log storage and prevention of unauthorized log changes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear hierarchy of T1, T2, and T3 analysts to process logs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a T1/T2/T3 analyst hierarchy processes logs
questions.evaluation_focus: T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy for log processing

questions.prompt: Does the organization use AI to assist log summarization or pattern detection across large log volumes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI assists log summarization and pattern detection
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-assisted log summarization and pattern detection

questions.prompt: Can analysts use AI-generated investigation queries that they review before execution?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI-generated investigation queries are reviewed by analysts
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-generated investigation queries with analyst review

questions.prompt: Are policies in place governing approved AI use in log analysis workflows?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI use in log analysis is governed
questions.evaluation_focus: Governance for AI use in log analysis workflows
